overview.text: Hunter Water provides drinking water, wastewater and recycled-water services to around 600,000 people across the Lower Hunter — Newcastle, Lake Macquarie, Maitland, Cessnock, Port Stephens and Dungog.

items: Major sources: Chichester Dam, Grahamstown Dam, Tomago/Anna Bay sandbeds.
24/7 incident response for main breaks and sewage overflows.
